title: Government Code § 2267.051
text:
Sec. 2267.051. APPROVAL REQUIRED. A person may not develop or operate a qualifying project unless the person obtains the approval of and contracts with the responsible governmental entity under this chapter. 

Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1334 (S.B. 1048), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2011.
Amended by: 
Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1075 (H.B. 2475), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2015.
chapter_title: GOVERNMENT CODE CHAPTER 2267. PUBLIC AND PRIVATE FACILITIES AND INFRASTRUCTURE
